user.title: Rain Bird IQ4
user.description: Enter your Rain Bird IQ4 cloud account credentials.

data_description.auth_channel: How the integration logs in. Leave on "Web portal" for most accounts. Choose "Mobile app" only if zone control fails with a 403 error (e.g. US free-tier accounts).

select_controller.title: Select controller
select_controller.description: Multiple controllers were found on this account. Choose the one to add.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check your credentials and internet connection, then try again.
error.no_controllers: No controllers were found on this account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the logs for details.

data_description.auth_channel: How the integration logs in. Leave on "Web portal" for most accounts. Choose "Mobile app" only if zone control fails with a 403 error (e.g. US free-tier accounts). Changing this reloads the integration.

options.web: Web portal (default) — works for most accounts
options.app: Mobile app — use if zone control fails with 403 (e.g. US free tier)
